# teams app user-auth oauth remove

Remove an OAuth connection from an Azure bot

## Usage

```
teams app user-auth oauth remove [appId] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `appId` | App ID | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--connection-name <name>` | OAuth connection name to remove |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
